info.title: CWM Roslyn Navigator — MCP Server for .NET
info.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI coding assistants semantic understanding of .NET codebases via Roslyn. 15 read-only tools for symbol navigation, reference finding, type hierarchy, dependency graphs, anti-pattern detection, dead code analysis, and diagnostics — all returning token-optimized responses. Part of the dotnet-claude-kit ecosystem.
